text:
Created attachment 195282
acme-client.diff

(In reply to Guido Falsi from comment #5)
Thanks for the hint.  Adding -lpthread to LDFLAGS seems to solve
the problem (or at least I don't get the "tls_init: No error: 0"
message anymore, still need to do a real world test).
